title: False reports of corruption after writing db with two different versions (3.7 and 3.6).
key_bug_features: Writing db with different versions causes false corruption reports.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test A', 1.5);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test B', NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC;
